intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 15:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/6. 75% FTP, Seated. 15:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% through. This is your workout. Own it. 75% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First interval at 115%. Set the tone. Your body remembers the last time you quit early.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First interval: 3:00 at 108-115% FTP. Aero. Focus on pacing, not heroics.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 1/6. You're starting fresh. Set the standard for the rest of the workout.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First interval. Still optimistic. That'll change in about 3 minutes.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First interval: 3:00 at 108-115%. Settle in, don't overcook it.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/6. 55% FTP, Seated. 3:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 2 of 6.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/6. Duration: 3:00. Power target unchanged, but cumulative stress is building.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/6. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 115% for 3:00. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 3:00. Then 26min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 55% × 3:00. Then 26min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 45% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 3:00. Then 26min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 3:00 at 55%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 50% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 115% for 3:00. Next up: 3:00 recovery, then 3min at 115%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 50% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 50% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 50% done. 115% for 3:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 55% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 3:00 at 55%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 3:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 3:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Power: 45-55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're 62% through this session. The deep work happens now, when you're tired.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 4/6. 3:00 at 115%. Cadence: 90-100 rpm. Aero. 2 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 2 reps left. 17 minutes total. Your competition quit 20 minutes ago. You're still here.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 62% done. The good news: almost finished. The bad news: 2 intervals left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 4/6. 115% FTP × 3:00. Aero. 2 more to build fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 67% done. 0 intervals left. 14 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 12min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 36 minutes of work done. 14 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 36 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 3:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Deep into it now. 39 minutes of work behind you. Finish what you started.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 73% through session. Rep 5/6. You've done 12min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 39 minutes of work done. 11 to go. You're right where you need to be.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 1 reps to go. Your body is writing a strongly worded letter. You won't read it until after cooldown.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 39 minutes in. 115% FTP, 90-100 rpm. This builds your race-winning power.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 79% done. 0 intervals left. 8 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 79% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 79% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last one. Your body is lying — you have more. Prove it. Then you can rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Last rep. 108-115% FTP, 90-100 rpm. Aero. Finish strong, then 5 minutes easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last one. Everything you have. Then you're done and you'll be stronger for it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final rep. Your FTP is filing for protective custody. Ignore it. 3:00 and done.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 115% × 3:00. Then 5min cooldown. Leave nothing.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 90% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 90% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
